name: PT Bank Ganesha Tbk
summary: P.T. Bank Ganesha Tbk provides various general banking products and services for individuals and businesses in Indonesia. The company operates through Banking, Consumer, Treasury, and Others segments. It accepts savings, current, and time deposits. The company also provides fixed income, car, housing, working capital, and investment loans, as well as letters of credit and bank guarantees. In addition, it offers safe deposit boxes, credit cards, and e-statements; automated teller machine, remittance, phone and electricity bill payment, tax payment, export/import, foreign exchange, and other banking services; and bancassurance products. The company serves customers through a network of 1 head office, 11 branch/sub-branch offices, and 2 cash offices. P.T. Bank Ganesha Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
